channel.title: NAJB Fink, S Ehrmann, J Li, P Dailey, P McKiernan, C Darquenne, AR Martin, B Rothen-Rutishauser, PJ Kuehl, S Häussermann, R MacLoughlin, GC Smaldone, B Muellinger, TE Corcoran, R Dhand | PlatCOVID

item.title: Reducing Aerosol-Related Risk of Transmission in the Era of COVID-19: An Interim Guidance Endorsed by the International Society of Aerosols in Medicine.
